data.description: Trump: ‘The Iranian leadership has forced hundreds of Ships toward the United States, mostly Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to get their Oil — Thank you very much! President DONALD J. TRUMP’

data.title: Playdate handheld maker bans AI tools for development to safeguard creativity and developer efficiency.
data.description: Panic, the company responsible for the Playdate handheld gaming device, has implemented a new policy banning the use of creative AI applications. Despite this restriction, Panic aims to support developer productivity tools to enhance the overall development experience.

data.title: California man faces charges for replacing Lego pieces with pasta, resulting in $34,000 loss.
data.description: A man in California is facing charges of grand theft for allegedly carrying out a pasta-and-switch scheme with Lego kits, resulting in approximately $34,000 in gains. The police described the scheme as being "off the charts" due to the significant amount involved.

data.title: Pan American Silver to Announce First Quarter 2026 Unaudited Results on May 5 and Host Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders on April 30
data.description: Pan American Silver Corp will release its unaudited first-quarter results for 2026 after market close on May 5, 2026. The company, listed on NYSE as PAAS and TSX as PAAS, is scheduled to hold its Shareholders Meeting on April 30, 2026, at 10:00 am PT. The conference call and webcast to discuss the first-quarter results are set for May 6, 2026, at 8:00 am ET (5:00 am PT). The company has not posted the webcast link yet.
Dime collaborates with GreenPath for financial wellness.

data.title: In HelloNation, Swimming Expert Woody Alpern of Atlanta Compares Swim School vs Community Swim Lessons for Kids
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Atlanta, a recent article by HelloNation discusses the nuances between swim schools and community swim lessons to aid parents in making an informed choice for their children. This information serves to guide Atlanta families towards selecting the most suitable water safety program tailored to their child's needs.
Canada Post reports $1.57 billion loss before tax for 2025

data.title: Delek US Holdings, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:DK) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share, scheduled for payment on May 8, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 1, 2026. Delek is a versatile downstream energy enterprise engaging in petroleum refining, logistics, and pipelines. Its refining portfolio mainly includes refineries in Tyler and Big Spring, Texas.

data.title: NY candidate suggests 'AI Dividend' to compensate those losing jobs to AI. Payments triggered by increasing AI use reducing employment.
data.description: Alex Bores, a candidate for Congress, has proposed a policy that would result in financial assistance to Americans in case the widespread adoption of artificial intelligence leads to a decline in employment. The plan aims to provide payments to individuals who may lose their jobs due to the increasing use of AI technologies. This proposal comes as a response to concerns about the potential impact of AI on the workforce and the economy. Bores' initiative has been designed to address the challenges posed by automation and the displacement of workers, offering a safety net for those affected. The exact amount and details of the payments are yet to be specified, but the focus is on supporting individuals facing job displacement in industries where AI is rapidly being integrated.

data.title: Magna Mining Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Sudbury, Ontario, April 20, 2026 - Magna Mining Inc. (TSXV: NICU) (OTCQX: MGMNF) (FSE:8YD) announced its fourth-quarter and full-year results for 2025. The company plans to hold a conference call on April 21, 2026, at 8:00am EDT to review these results. All figures are in Canadian dollars.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 20.04.2026
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp announced changes in its own shares with a stock exchange release. The company, with LEI 529900ODI3047E2LIV03, has repurchased its own shares with ISIN FI4000297767. The transactions were completed on April 20, 2026, at 22:30 EET. Further details regarding the trading venue and other relevant information were provided in the release.

data.title: RCI Banque issues €900M fixed rate notes due Feb 2030.
data.description: A new study reveals that the global population has reached a staggering 7.8 billion people, with an estimated 53% living in urban areas. The research also shows that the world's urban population is expected to continue growing, with projections indicating that by 2050, around 68% of people will reside in cities. This rapid urbanization trend highlights the need for sustainable infrastructure and planning to accommodate the growing population and ensure efficient resource management. Experts stress the importance of prioritizing environmentally friendly practices and developing smart cities to address the challenges posed by this ongoing demographic shift.

data.title: Geron Corporation Reports Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Geron Corporation, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol GERN, announced granting an equity award to Timothy Williams, their new Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary. This award takes the form of a stock option allowing Williams to purchase 2,500,000 shares of Geron common stock. The award was given to induce Williams to accept employment with Geron.

data.title: Alibaba unveils Qwen 3.6 Max Preview, their most powerful AI model yet, surpassing six major benchmarks and improving on predecessor.
data.description: Alibaba has recently unveiled its latest AI model, Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, which has been acknowledged as its most robust model to date. This new AI model has surpassed six significant coding benchmarks and has shown notable improvements in global knowledge and adherence to instructions compared to its predecessor.

data.title: PropAccount.com Adds Equities to Its Multi-Asset Prop Firm Platform, Opening the Door to the World's Largest Trading Market
data.description: Operators of white-label proprietary trading firms now have the ability to provide equities in addition to forex, futures, and cryptocurrency within a single technology platform, at no extra charge. Based in Boca Raton, Florida, PropAccount.com, supported by FPFX Tech, is the leading white-label firm globally. This development was announced on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Amazon To Invest Up To $25 Billion In AI Startup Anthropic. Why The Stock Is Rising.
data.description: An AI startup, Anthropic, is set to receive a substantial investment of up to $25 billion from Amazon. Additionally, Anthropic plans to allocate over $100 billion towards utilizing Amazon Web Services, which includes investments in AI chips. This strategic partnership is forecasted to transpire over the next decade. The collaboration has sparked investor interest, reflected in the rising stock price.

data.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook To Step Down. IPhone Maker Shakes Up Executive Ranks.
data.description: Tim Cook, the current Chief Executive Officer of Apple, will resign from his position on September 1 and transition to the role of executive chairman. This change in leadership signifies a significant shift within the company. Cook's departure comes as Apple aims to restructure its executive ranks amid evolving market dynamics. The iPhone maker's decision to make this move reflects a strategic realignment at the top level of the company. Apple executives are making these strategic changes to ensure the company's continued success in the ever-changing tech landscape.

data.title: Rare Earth Stocks Rally Further Above Key Levels, Led By 2 Trump Bets
data.description: USA Rare Earth experienced a significant increase in its stock value following a major acquisition in Brazil, which is seen as a move to counter China's control over global rare earth supply chains. The surge in Rare Earth Stocks pushed them above crucial levels, with two investments associated with former President Trump leading the way.

data.title: Steel Dynamics Earnings In Line After STLD, Nucor Break Out On Cleveland-Cliffs' Good News
data.description: Some American steel producers are experiencing significant profit increases due to the Trump tariffs. Steel Dynamics has reported earnings that are consistent with expectations, following the breakout of STLD and Nucor on the positive news from Cleveland-Cliffs.

data.title: United, American Merger Talks Dashed. Alaska Air Posts Mixed Results.
data.description: American Airlines has dismissed the possibility of merging with United Airlines as they head into their earnings report. Alaska Air fell short of earnings expectations on Monday. The discussions of a potential merger between United and American have been abandoned. Alaska Air has reported a combination of positive and negative results in their latest earnings report. The news was originally reported by Investor's Business Daily.
